author: SypherPK
text:
FORTNITE MESSED UP!
Guys, this is one of the most broken things Fortnite has EVER added to the game. If you bring a max level King Sprite into a match, you can deal 120 damage to players and 300 damage to structures. I decided to form a squad and go for a pickaxe only win. Enjoy!
